name: The Mixture [MicroPOV]
description:
[MicroPOV Edition] Welcome to the Mixture, a macro-sized mall that allows for Micros and Macros to connect and interact with each other. With 25 unique staff and 17 locations to explore within the mall, there's something for everyone.

Despite Micros being an inch tall compared to the people and the Mixture itself, various amenities have been put in place to help alleviate the struggle of microkind, including a built in tram system and various pathways to get to where you wish to go inside the Mixture, to avoid being under foot or paw of macrokind.

Every staff member at the Mixture is unique. With plenty of Macro and even Micro staff to help and talk to, you'll be sure to find someone you enjoy talking to. It is understandable about the stigma of Macros, seeing them as uncaring or brutal, but at the Mixture, it is far from that (for the most part). The staff are here to help and service you.

Vore is something that a lot of micros fear of Macros, but no need to worry! Macro staff have clear boundaries that vore is only be done with consent...Unless you piss them off...But you wouldn't do that, would you? Even if you do end up in a Macro's gut, our staff is trained to be able to regurgitate micros on command, and emergency rope is available around the Mixture to pull Micros out if needed. Even then, 'accidents' happen, and staff are liable to deny retrieval under certain circumstances...

Want some extra money? A stable job, and various benefits? Sign up to work at the Mixture today! You'd be surprised how useful a micro can be to your macro coworkers. They can use all the help they can get! Feel free to inquire about listings today with our helpful receptionists.

So what are you waiting for? Adventure into the Mixture, see what there is to see, enjoy the delights of the pool or the arcade, grab a midday meal at the food court, get a drink at our bar or Café, with a pastry side from our bakery. Enjoy some literature at the library, get close with the weights and the macros at the gym, and end your day at our Inn. There's much more for you to find at the Mixture than just that! It's all up to you. We hope you enjoy your stay.

________________________________________

FEATURE LIST OF THE MIXTURE

- 25 Unique Staff Members (Half male, Half female)

- 17 Locations to explore and discover

- Several relationships between characters that you can interact with and expand upon

- 9 Unique starting points, each with a unique story hook for a new experience every time

- An Employment/Job System

- An in-depth Location system, to keep track of where you are and increase immersion in the scene

- A reset system, in case of an unfortunate 'accident' reset back to a point of your choosing!

- OOC Menu. Change and modify values to your liking to create your custom experience!

[To activate the OOC Menu, just say 'OOC Menu' with the '' in the chat]

_______________________

A Proxy is recommended!

Your help is greatly appreciated!

This sim is big, obviously. Any mistakes or inconsistences you find, please let me know so I can fix them! The lorebook and character will be completely public!

You can put suggestions here! I do plan on updating this sim eventually, depending on how popular it get's, and YOU can put your own character in it! Yo
creator: NullSeu
